<!-- One PR adds one submission bundle under submissions/. See CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

## Submission checklist

- [ ] The `submitter` block in `submission.yaml` has a real name and contact filled in.
- [ ] The bundle was built against a currently-accepted suite revision.
- [ ] This PR adds exactly one bundle folder under `submissions/`.
- [ ] The bundle was generated with `gptnt submission new` and not hand-edited (only the `submitter` block is filled by hand).
